message:
Add context/pending rotation store tests (55.7% → 61.5%)

16 tests for PendingRotationStore: Add, Get, GetAll, Remove,
GetForSession, GetExpired, CleanExpired, Count, Clear, Persistence,
MalformedLines, plus ToPendingRotation/FromPendingRotation converters.
All store methods went from 0% to 86-100% coverage.

Ref: bd-2csgt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
